detail.title: My application
detail.instruction: Upload the following documents to continue your application.

signature.context: As the payer, you must sign the terms to validate {{name}}'s subscription.
signature.cgvuTitle: General Terms of Sale and Use
signature.accept: I have read and accept the terms

paiement.title: Payment
paiement.secure: No card or wallet data is stored here
paiement.payerNote: Payment is completed on Stripe Checkout
paiement.checkoutInfo: Card and crypto/stablecoin payment methods can appear depending on your Stripe configuration.
paiement.cancelled: Payment was cancelled. You can restart Checkout.
paiement.offline: An internet connection is required to complete payment.

validation.heroSubtitle: Our teams are checking your documents. You'll be notified as soon as your pass is ready.

confirmation.title: {{product}} is active!
confirmation.subtitle: {{name}} can travel right now on the Île-de-France network.

stepHints.1: Complete the information to move forward with the application.
stepHints.2: Complete your supporting documents to move forward with the application.
stepHints.3: Check your file to move to the next step.
stepHints.4: Finalise the payment to validate the subscription.
